title: selliguea conmixta
intro: Selliguea conmixta, also known as the "tiger's claw" or "seligia," is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Selliguea conmixta include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Selliguea conmixta is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
